title: ATTITUDE Shower & Tile Cleaner, EWG Verified, Plant-Based & Vegan Bathroom Spray, Removes Soap Scum & Grime, Citrus Zest Scent, 800 mL
features: EWG VERIFIED: This shower cleaner is formulated with clean ingredients and certified by the Environmental Working Group to meet their strict health and safety standards. Free from concerning substances like ammonia, chlorine, and glycol solvents.

POWERFUL, NATURALLY DERIVED FORMULA: Made with 94% natural origin ingredients¹, this shower cleaner spray removes soap scum, limescale, stains , leaving a streak-free shine and a refreshing citrus scent in your bathroom.

IDEAL FOR BATHROOM TUBS & TILES: This daily shower cleaner is perfect for all bathroom surfaces, including tiles, bathtubs, ceramic, and shower glass doors. It helps eliminate and prevent soap scum — no rinsing required.

ECO-CONCIOUS PACKAGING: Packaged in a recyclable HDPE #2 bottle, this shower tile cleaner spray is easy to reuse and refill. Pair it with our FSC-certified, recyclable cardboard eco-refill to help cut down on plastic waste.
VEGAN & CRUELTY-FREE: This shower cleaner sprayer 100% vegan and cruelty-free. Made for your well-being while respecting animals.
description: Product Description Keep your bathroom spotless with ATTITUDE’s EWG VERIFIED shower tile cleaner — made with 94% natural origin ingredients¹ and a refreshing citrus scent. This powerful, plant-based formula tackles soap scum, limescale, , and stains, leaving behind a clean, streak-free shine with no rinsing required. Perfect for tiles, bathtubs, ceramic, and shower glass doors, it’s designed for daily use on all your bathroom surfaces. Free from ammonia, chlorine, and glycol solvents, it meets the Environmental Working Group’s strict health and safety standards. Packaged in a recyclable HDPE #2 bottle, it’s refillable with our FSC-certified eco-refill, helping you reduce plastic waste. Plus, it’s vegan, cruelty-free, and made for your well-being and a cleaner home. Ingredients <5% non-ionic surfactants/ agents de surface non ioniques (caprylyl glucoside, myristyl glucoside). Contains also / Contient aussi: Aqua / Water / Eau, Citric Acid, Propanediol, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Gluconate, Sapindus Mukorossi Fruit Extract, Terpineol Acetate*, Terpineol*, Tetrahydrolinalool*, Triethyl Citrate*, *fragrance (Parfum).Disclaimer: Formulations can be optimized and ingredients may vary. Directions Opening/closing system: turn the “STOP” spray nozzle for a precise application. Spray on the surface and wipe with a dry cloth for a streak-free finish. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.
